main_character.name: Dark Miku Cosplayer
main_character.description: A beautiful Japanese woman cosplaying as a fallen Hatsune Miku. She has long, dark teal twintails with black tips, one large black-feathered wing on her left and a glowing teal wing scar on her right. She wears a tattered black and teal vocaloid outfit with gothic lace and metallic accents. Her eyes glow with a soft teal light. Her expression is melancholic yet powerful.
main_character.consistency_tokens: Japanese woman, dark teal twintails, black-feathered wing, glowing eyes, gothic miku outfit
